AVEMUJICA-RHYTHM.description: Rhythm effects trigger if the last card(s) played this combat are of the specified type(s) and in the specified order.
AVEMUJICA-RHYTHM.title: Rhythm
AVEMUJICA-COMPOSE.description: Adds the specified effect to the [gold]Song[/gold]. If no effect is specified, choose a random effect to add. After [gold]Composing[/gold] [blue]3[/blue] times, add the [gold]Song[/gold] to your hand.
AVEMUJICA-COMPOSE.title: Compose
AVEMUJICA-AWAKEN.description: Summons an ally to assist you. If an ally is already present, they gain HP instead. Allies automatically use their “+” ability at the end of your turn. You can trigger their “-“ abilities if they have sufficient HP by clicking the buttons next to their intent. Allies can only take 1 action per turn.
AVEMUJICA-AWAKEN.title: Awaken
